articles.title: Fashion’s Favorite Climbing-Inspired Sneaker Has an American-Built Update
articles.summary: The KEEN Jasper KM Lite has arrived with an American build that's both responsibly made and lightweight by design. First introduced in 2008 as the brand’s climbing-inspired outdoor sneaker, the Jasper now has a refreshed look that delivers sleek style without compromising on comfort or quality. Most noticeably, the uppers have been smoothed with discreet stitching while the heel counter is satisfyingly streamlined into the midsole. It’s a subtle shift, but one that quietly ushers the Jasper from trail staple to a pair that’s just as at home in the city as it is off-grid.For men, the Jasper KM comes in three versatile colorways: Canteen/Black; Khaki/Birch; Black/Steel Grey, while for women, colorways include Granite Green/Black; Cameo Rose/Black; Plaza Taupe/Bitch; Brindle/Birch. articles.title: Halfords profits set to hit upper end of expectations amid strong trading
articles.summary: Halfords has said full-year profits are expected to come in around the upper end of market expectations after stronger trading across both its retail and autocentre divisions. It announced today that group like-for-like sales rose 4.8 per cent in FY26, with retail sales up 4.1 per cent and autocentres, excluding Avayler, climbing 5.8 per cent....

articles.title: TUNE’s Nike Air Force 1 CVS “Wardrobe Unlocked” Is Designed to Degrade
articles.summary: Name: TUNE x Nike Air Force 1 CVS “Wardrobe Unlocked”Colorway: Twilight MarshSKU: IR5895-399MSRP: TBCRelease Date: May 1Where to Buy: TUNE, TUNE SeongsuSeoul boutique TUNE and Nike are teaming up to release the TUNE x Nike Air Force 1 CVS "Wardrobe Unlocked," a heavily modified take on the 1990s silhouette that prioritizes material evolution.The collaboration entirely removes traditional leather from the upper, opting instead for a full canvas construction. Dressed in a monochromatic "Twilight Marsh" deep olive hue, the tonal approach gives the shoe a distinctly utilitarian, military-inspired structural finish.
